name: preference-frequency-manager
description: Use when the user asks to "build a preference center", "set up a frequency opt-down ladder", "give people a step-down instead of unsubscribe", or "design a topic/cadence preference page"; produces a preference-center field spec, a frequency/topic opt-down ladder (down-tier paths that substitute for a hard unsubscribe), a preference-to-suppression mapping, and a SEND N-dimension sub-item note on preference-center / frequency options offered. Not for the lifecycle flow map or cadence governance —
author: aaron-he-zhu
